articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: AI ‘actor’ Tilly Norwood put out the worst song I’ve ever heard - TechCrunch
articles.description: This song is an AI actor's rallying cry to other AI actors, urging them to keep going despite the naysayers who doubt their humanity. Literally no one can relate to this.
articles.content:
When the production company Particle6 debuted its AI-generated “actor” Tilly Norwood last fall, the move was not warmly welcomed by Hollywood.
“Good Lord, we’re screwed,” Golden Globe winner Emily B… [+4721 chars]
